## Type of Change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change fixing an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change adding functionality)
- [ ] 📜 New automation script
- [ ] 🔌 New/updated plugin
- [ ] 🏗️ New OpenTofu module
- [ ] 📝 Documentation update
- [ ] ♻️ Refactoring (no functional changes)
- [ ] ⚠️ Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the [coding standards](CONTRIBUTING.md#coding-standards)
- [ ] I have run `Invoke-Pester ./tests/` and all tests pass
- [ ] I have run `Invoke-ScriptAnalyzer -Path ./src/ -Recurse` with no errors
- [ ] I have added tests for new functionality
- [ ] I have updated documentation as needed
- [ ] My changes work on Windows (required) and at least one of Linux/macOS
- [ ] I have not committed any secrets, credentials, or internal URLs
- [ ] My commit messages follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)
